title: Senior Strategy Consultant
description: Lead strategic engagements for APAC clients across consumer goods, financial services, and technology. Develop market entry strategies, operating models, and transformation roadmaps. Requires 8+ years consulting experience, strong stakeholder management, and proficiency in data-driven decision making.

title: Head of Strategic Partnerships
description: Drive B2B partnership strategy across Southeast Asia. Identify, negotiate, and manage strategic alliances with enterprise clients. Lead cross-functional teams to deliver integrated solutions. Ideal for candidates with 10+ years in strategy, business development, or consulting.

title: Director of Product Strategy
description: Define product vision and go-to-market strategy for B2B fintech solutions. Collaborate with engineering, sales, and regional teams to launch new digital channels. Requires experience in product lifecycle management, market analysis, and stakeholder alignment across APAC markets.

title: Management Consultant (Senior)
description: Support C-suite clients in operational transformation, cost optimization, and growth strategy. Lead workstreams, develop executive presentations, and mentor junior consultants. Strong analytical skills and experience in supply chain or corporate finance preferred.

title: Regional Business Development Lead
description: Expand market presence across Thailand, Vietnam, and Indonesia. Build relationships with government bodies, tourism boards, and corporate partners. Develop 3-year growth plans and track KPIs. Background in strategy, partnerships, or international business required.

title: Strategic Operations Manager
description: Optimize cross-border operations and digital transformation initiatives. Lead SAP/Cloud integration projects, improve service delivery efficiency, and align regional teams with global strategy. Requires 7+ years in operations, strategy, or program management.
